title: अपना Schedule लिखें
description: Time expressions और numbers use करते हुए अपनी दिनचर्या लिखें।

blocks.title: 'मेरी 8 बजे meeting है' — Build it
blocks.translation: My meeting is at eight o'clock

items.answer: The shop opens at nine o'clock.

items.source: मैं रोज़ सुबह exercise करता/करती हूँ।

blocks.prompt: अपने एक typical weekday का schedule अंग्रेज़ी में लिखें। कम से कम 5-7 activities, times के साथ। जैसे: 'I wake up at 6 AM...'
blocks.sampleAnswer: I wake up at 6 AM every day. I eat breakfast at 7 o'clock. My work starts at 9 AM. I have lunch at 1 PM. I finish work at 6 PM. I eat dinner at 8 PM. I study English for one hour every evening. I go to sleep at 11 PM.
